hero.headline: One Platform. Complete Financial Clarity.
hero.subheadline: Track expenses, subscriptions, insurance, loans, and family finances — securely in one intelligent system.

benefits.subscriptions: See all subscriptions in one place

problem.title: Modern Finances Are Fragmented
problem.intro: Subscriptions renew silently. Insurance details get lost. Family members stay unaware. Financial stress builds quietly.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions Leak
subscriptions.quote: What is not observed cannot be controlled.

insurance.title: Insurance Scattered
insurance.quote: A fort with unseen cracks cannot defend.

family.title: Family Unaware
family.quote: A kingdom divided in knowledge is divided in strength.

problem.closing: A household must be governed with clarity, not managed in haste.

step1.title: Create Your Svarajya
step1.description: Set up your financial kingdom in minutes. Add family members with controlled access.

step2.title: Add Your Financial Data
step2.description: Link subscriptions, insurance policies, loans, savings, and important documents.

step3.title: Gain Complete Clarity
step3.description: See everything in one dashboard. Get insights, alerts, and family-wide visibility.

solution.title: Your Finances Are a Kingdom. Govern Them Wisely.
solution.intro: Chanakya taught that a strong state rests on protection, disciplined spending, and a guarded treasury. So does a household.

raksha.name: Raksha (Fort)
raksha.subtitle: Insurance & Protection
raksha.opening: A ruler who neglects protection invites uncertainty. Security is not fear. It is preparation.
raksha.closing: A strong fort allows peaceful growth.

vyaya.name: Vyaya (Matka)
vyaya.subtitle: Expenses & Subscriptions
vyaya.opening: Wealth does not disappear suddenly. It flows away in unnoticed streams.
vyaya.closing: Observe your flow. Control will follow.

rin.name: Rin (Battlefield)
rin.subtitle: Loans & Debt
rin.summary: Debt managed with strategy, not stress.
rin.opening: Debt is not the enemy. Lack of strategy is.
rin.closing: Win the battle before seeking expansion.

mitra.name: Mitra (Legacy)
mitra.subtitle: Nominees & Family Access
mitra.summary: Ensure your wealth reaches the right hands.

granthagaar.name: Granthagaar (Archive)
granthagaar.subtitle: Documents & Records
granthagaar.summary: Order in records creates peace of mind.

family.title: Built for Families
family.intro: Svarajya is designed for Indian households where financial decisions are shared.

sharing.title: Share Securely with Family Members
sharing.description: Invite spouse, parents, or children with controlled access.

access.title: Role-Based Access Control
access.description: Decide who sees what. Admins, viewers, or contributors.

tracking.title: Shared Expense Tracking
tracking.description: Track household expenses together with full transparency.

nominees.title: Nominee Management
nominees.description: Ensure the right people know about the right assets.

gamification.title: Track Progress. Build Financial Discipline.
gamification.intro: Progress must be measured, not assumed.

chapters.title: Complete financial chapters step by step
chapters.description: Move through structured lessons at your own pace

strengthen.title: Strengthen each zone of your Svarajya
strengthen.description: Build protection, manage expenses, conquer debt

effort.title: Steady effort builds enduring strength
effort.description: This is not entertainment. It is structured improvement.

security.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
security.intro: Your financial data deserves the highest protection.

encryption.title: End-to-End Encryption
encryption.description: Your financial data is encrypted at rest and in transit.

cloud.title: Secure Cloud Infrastructure
cloud.description: Hosted on enterprise-grade servers with 99.9% uptime.

access.title: Role-Based Access
access.description: Control exactly who sees what in your Svarajya.

logs.title: Activity Logs

privacy.description: We do not sell your financial data. Ever.

security.statement: We do not sell your financial data. Ever.

testimonial1.quote: Finally, a platform where my entire family can see our financial picture. No more scattered spreadsheets.
testimonial1.name: Sharma Family

testimonial2.quote: I love how Svarajya organizes everything. Insurance, loans, subscriptions — all in one place.
testimonial2.name: Priya Mehta

testimonial3.quote: The family sharing feature is brilliant. My parents can finally see where we stand financially.
testimonial3.name: Rajesh Kumar

q1.question: What is Svarajya?
q1.answer: Svarajya is a family financial management platform that helps you track expenses, subscriptions, insurance, loans, and family finances in one secure place.

q2.question: Is Svarajya free to use?
q2.answer: Yes, Svarajya offers a free plan with core features. Premium plans with advanced features are also available.

q3.question: Is my family's data safe?
q3.answer: Absolutely. We use end-to-end encryption, secure cloud infrastructure, and role-based access controls. We never sell your data.

q4.question: Where is my data stored?
q4.answer: Your data is stored on enterprise-grade cloud servers with 99.9% uptime and regular backups.

q5.question: Can I cancel anytime?
q5.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription anytime. Your data remains accessible for 30 days after cancellation.

q6.question: Is there a mobile app?
q6.answer: Svarajya is a progressive web app (PWA) that works beautifully on mobile browsers. Native apps are coming soon.

finalCta.title: Take Control of Your Family's Finances
finalCta.subtitle: Join thousands of families building financial clarity.
finalCta.cta: Start Free — No Credit Card Needed

footer.tagline: Svarajya stands on clarity, discipline, and foresight.
